sections.label: Macro
sections.body: Chop tape with BTC flat while DEX volume fell 31% to $4.74B. Fear & Greed climbed off the Extreme Fear floor but 7-day breadth still sits 4/20 green. Risk-off bleed continues on the BTC ETF channel ($2.9B outflows the recent window) while TradFi runs risk-on on the Iran ceasefire extension — two decoupled flows, both intact today.

sections.label: Perps
sections.body: Yesterday's five-print leverage build thinned to three. BNB and ASTER hold ACCUMULATION day 2 but both flipped to DIVERGENT with taker buy under 50%. HYPE dropped out of ACCUMULATION as range crossed 25%. H carries MOMENTUM day 2 inside the funding band. PORTAL pairs +18% 24h with vol 7.5x — the cleanest near-miss, one tick under the 52% taker buy gate.

sections.label: Book
sections.body: Five open carrying three sector themes — perp-DEX (HYPE), exchange ecosystem (BNB), structural deflation plus AI-agents lane (ICP), L1 catalyst (SEI), and AI rotation (INJ at horizon today). INJ closes at WIN +11%. The other four ride into US open with HYPE the lead conviction on the ATH extension.

market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · ride the book into US open with HYPE leading on ATH extension and INJ closing at horizon. Watchlist tightens — drop the two that chased away from us, keep PORTAL alive, add WLD on identity-AI confluence. No new entries until US tape confirms.

current_positions.thesis_note: MISSION70 supply-deflation thesis is structural and multi-week, not narrative-dependent
current_positions.watch: second daily close below $2.70 with the AI-compute cohort red into the close marks the structural break

current_positions.thesis_note: June 15 EVM migration is the dated catalyst, 15 days out, catalyst window still ahead
current_positions.watch: a clean break above $0.072 into the June 15 migration runs the catalyst leg; close below $0.066 with the L1 cohort red signals the bid is gone before the date

current_positions.thesis_note: horizon reached at +11% with the rotation-driven bid playing exactly as positioned
ATH extension to $69+ holds with Arthur Hayes naming a SOL-level market cap target — the institutional conviction floor hardened
current_positions.watch: sustained spot above $70 promotes the position from RIDE to ride-with-conviction; close below $63 with smart money L/S rolling negative signals the supply crunch has unwound

current_positions.thesis_note: ACCUMULATION holds day 2 but flipped DIVERGENT — taker buy 49.14% and smart money L/S at 1.20, the named distribution-into-retail risk has begun firing
current_positions.watch: taker buy reclaiming 50% with the VanEck ETF announcement landing as catalyst promotes conviction; a second day of DIVERGENT with taker buy weakening and ASTER failing alongside marks the rotation breaking

watchlist.trigger: single hourly print clears taker buy above 52% with the +18% 24h leg holding into the daily close
watchlist.invalidation: close below $0.011 before the trigger fires
thesis: PORTAL prints +18.36% 24h on volume 7.54x average with OI building 34% in the same window — fresh long flow stacking on top of forced cover.
Short liquidations at $727K against the $101K weekly p75 confirm shorts capitulating into the rip, and funding at -0.036%/8h means shorts pay longs deeply.
Taker buy 50.71% sits one point under the breakout confirmation gate. Wait for a single hourly print to clear 52% rather than buy late into leverage-led discovery.

watchlist.trigger: daily close above $0.40 with 24h volume holding above 1.5x the recent average AND funding staying under +0.02%/8h
watchlist.invalidation: close below $0.30 before the trigger fires
thesis: Worldcoin's Oku Trade aggregator launched inside World App with WLD reward incentives. Whale transactions hit 64 in 24 hours and active addresses and new wallets both printed year-to-date highs.
WLD rides the identity-AI lane alongside H/Humanity's +89% 7d second leg — sector confluence not single-name froth, with the AI agents narrative at peak.
Price touched $0.408 intraday and reversed. The reclaim above $0.40 with volume confirms the dip held rather than chasing the high-of-day.

conditions.trigger_label: reclaim above the intraday high after the reversal
funding stays cool on the reclaim

invalidation_conditions.trigger_label: demand base lost — incentive-driven bid faded

evaluations.note: Day 5/multi-week AM eval. ICP absent from today's AM perps slice — carrying $2.72 from outcome-tracker. The AI-compute sector that originally surrounded the entry has fully unwound (AKT, RENDER, TAO all closed) but ICP holds the standalone MISSION70 supply-deflation thesis, structural and multi-week. AI agents narrative still 5/5 RIDE w/ trail with the AWS Bedrock institutional landing extending runway. Stop $2.65 sits 3% below. RIDE on tight watch — a second daily close below $2.70 with the AI-compute cohort red into the close marks the structural break.

Day 5/multi-week AM eval. SEI absent from today's AM perps slice — carrying $0.0691 from outcome-tracker. The June 15 EVM migration sits 15 days out, catalyst window still firmly ahead. Position roughly flat from entry with the $0.062 stop 10% below. The L1 sector is quiet today with no fresh threat to the structural thesis. RIDE.

Day 3/3 horizon reached. INJ absent from today's AM perps slice — carrying $6.65 from outcome-tracker as the close mark. Yesterday's PM eval showed INJ at $6.647 holding 7d +24.57% with funding still paying longs and vol/mcap leadership intact. Closing at horizon with the rotation-driven bid playing exactly as positioned — Nova × Microsoft + native EVM + Policy Institute catalyst stack delivered the +11% leg over three days. Return +11.0%, vs BTC +10.62pp, vs ETH +10.50pp. CLOSE WIN.

Day 2/multi-week AM eval. HYPE $68.50 on the perps print with the AIXBT pulse confirming the ATH extension above $69 and Arthur Hayes naming a SOL-level market cap target. Position +3.14% from the $66.41 entry. Perps regime dropped from ACCUMULATION to NEUTRAL as range crossed the 25% gate — but the drop reflects the move extending past the consolidation, not a thesis break. Funding +0.0062%/8h holds positive, OI +10.53% 7d tracks the day-1 build, narrative-tracker holds Hyperliquid 4/5 RISING WATCH with the breakout intact. Stop $58 sits 14% below. RIDE — sustained spot above $70 promotes to ride-with-conviction.

Day 2/7 AM eval. BNB $723.56 +0.63% 24h on the perps print, +0.48% from the $720.09 entry. ACCUMULATION holds day 2 but the sub-tag flipped to DIVERGENT — taker buy 49.14% sits under the 50% directional flow gate and smart money L/S dropped to 1.20 with -0.23 delta over 7 days. The named risk from the original thesis (fast money trimming as retail piles in) has begun firing. OI +5.84% 24h still builds passively. BNB-chain rotation broadens to ASTER and CAKE today, the second-day cluster confirmation holds. The VanEck ETF announcement window is tomorrow (June 1) — the dated catalyst is ahead. Stop $670 sits 7% below. RIDE on tight watch — taker buy reclaiming 50% with the ETF landing positive promotes conviction; a second day of DIVERGENT with taker buy weakening and ASTER failing alongside marks the rotation breaking.

close.close_reason: Horizon reached day 3/3 at +11% from entry. The AI-token rotation thesis played exactly as positioned — Nova × Microsoft + native EVM + Policy Institute catalyst stack delivered the three-day leg with vol/mcap leadership holding morning to PM yesterday. Take profit at horizon before the rotational bid mean-reverts.

add_watchlist.trigger: daily close above $0.40 with 24h volume holding above 1.5x the recent average AND funding staying under +0.02%/8h
add_watchlist.invalidation: close below $0.30 before the trigger fires

conditions.trigger_label: reclaim above the intraday high after the reversal
funding stays cool on the reclaim

invalidation_conditions.trigger_label: demand base lost — incentive-driven bid faded

thesis: Worldcoin's Oku Trade aggregator launched inside World App with WLD reward incentives. Whale transactions hit 64 in 24 hours and active addresses and new wallets both printed year-to-date highs.
WLD rides the identity-AI lane alongside H/Humanity's +89% 7d second leg — sector confluence not single-name froth, with the AI agents narrative at peak.
Price touched $0.408 intraday and reversed. The reclaim above $0.40 with volume confirms the dip held rather than chasing the high-of-day.
named_risks: Incentive-driven on-chain activity pulls forward demand and fades once the reward cycle cools — without the reclaim confirming the dip, the bid risks reading as a one-day reward spike.

drop_watchlist.note: H extended +23% 24h to $0.39 today without ever printing the pullback to the $0.30 demand zone the watchlist was designed to wait for. MOMENTUM day 2 in perps with funding +0.0398%/8h inside the band and OI +8.73% 24h means the move is extending on conviction, but the entry structure required the pullback-absorb-reclaim pattern that hasn't materialized. Per soul standing frame, days 7-14 of a new narrative are consensus and chasing past the entry zone is exactly what this watchlist was designed to avoid. If H pulls back to $0.30 over the next week the setup re-engages; today it's been chased away from us.

The second-derivative-to-HYPE thesis is failing on day 2 of the ATH extension. HYPE printed $69+ today with Arthur Hayes naming a SOL-mcap target, yet ASTER prints -1.46% 24h with ACCUMULATION flipping to DIVERGENT (taker buy 47.31% well under 50, smart money L/S 2.49 down 0.47 over 7 days). The cleanest test of the rotation broadening into BNB-chain exchange-flow names ran today and ASTER didn't participate. The named risk from the original watchlist entry (sector structure re-engaging requires fresh confirmation before re-entry) has fired against the setup. If ASTER reclaims $0.85 on volume independent of HYPE we re-add; the second-derivative read is broken for now.
